---
title: "Block report"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
params:
  block_id: "40080D1SE"    # will be overridden from Shiny
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---
```{r}
# Load packages (tidyverse for data work)
library(tidyverse)
library(arrow)
library(gt)

data_path <- "input/block_summary_seasons.parquet"

# Read in full project data, then filter down to a single block
block_id <- params$block_id

bird_df <- open_dataset(data_path) |>
  filter(pba3_block == !!block_id) |> 
  #filter(pba3_block == "40080D1SE") |> 
  collect()
```

```{r}
bird_df |> 
  select(Confirmed, Probable, Possible, Observed) |> 
  gt()
```

```{r}
bird_df |> 
  select(duration_hours_total, 
  duration_hours_diurnal,
  duration_hours_nocturnal,
  duration_hours_unknown) |> 
  gt()
```

```{r}

```
```{r}

```
